texto: God’s definition of going well is unique, distinct, almost eccentric. His definition of wellness is not about health, finances, or job security. It’s not about unfailing protection from the vagaries and dangers of a broken world. It’s not about life being fair. It’s about acceptance.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Buchanan sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “God’s definition of going well is unique, distinct, almost eccentric. His definition of wellness …” articula reflexao, christian-living, about em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: For the place God calls us into isn’t doubt free—how can any place where we walk by faith and not by sight be that? No, the holy wild is where we have driving and haunting doubts, God-hungry doubts that pull us to our knees, force us to the Word, make us wrestle all night and not let go until He blesses us. The holy wild throngs with true skeptics.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Mark Buchanan que provoca temas ligados a fe. texto: We honestly think that we ourselves and those around us should be proficient with spiritual power, moving and acting with agility and endurance, wisdom and purity, able to conquer long-established habits of sloth and rebelliousness, simply on the basis of our desire and effort and sincerity...We have to train for the spiritual life.
